products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with the new Integrated Processor V1. Crystal clear hands-free calling with 4 beamforming microphones and Auto NC Optimizer. Up to 30 hours battery life with quick charge support — 3 minutes charge gives 3 hours playback.

products.title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Bluetooth Headphones
products.description: Bose QuietComfort 45 headphones balance noise cancellation and awareness in Quiet Mode and Aware Mode. TriPort acoustic architecture and volume-optimized Active EQ deliver powerful, balanced audio. 24-hour battery life keeps you listening all day.

products.title: Apple AirPods Max Space Gray
products.description: AirPods Max combine high-fidelity audio with industry-leading ANC in an over-ear design. A custom Apple silicon H1 chip in each ear cup provides computational audio for personalized spatial audio with dynamic head tracking. The cushion and headband are built with breathable mesh for comfort.
features: Apple H1 chip in each ear cup
Personalized Spatial Audio with head tracking

products.title: Jabra Evolve2 85 Professional Headset
products.description: Jabra Evolve2 85 delivers professional-grade ANC and superior call clarity for open offices. Equipped with 10 microphones for superior noise cancellation during calls. Flexible all-day comfort design with 37-hour battery life.

products.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless
products.description: The Momentum 4 Wireless delivers Sennheiser's renowned sound quality with adaptive noise cancellation. An astounding 60-hour battery life makes it ideal for long haul travelers and remote workers. Intuitive touch controls and customizable EQ via the Smart Control app.

products.title: Anker Soundcore Q45 Headphones
products.description: Anker Soundcore Q45 offers hybrid active noise cancellation at a budget-friendly price. Custom-tuned 40mm drivers with BassUp technology deliver deep, powerful sound. Up to 50 hours playtime in normal mode.

products.title: Beats Studio Pro Wireless Headphones
products.description: Beats Studio Pro features custom acoustic platform delivering clarity, range, and emotion in every listening experience. Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking creates an immersive soundstage. USB-C and 3.5mm inputs, plus 40-hour battery.

products.title: JBL Tour One M2 Wireless
products.description: JBL Tour One M2 delivers legendary JBL Pro Sound with adaptive noise cancelling and 4 beamforming mics. Smart Ambient technology lets you control how much of your surroundings you hear. Up to 30 hours battery with ANC on.

products.title: Microsoft Surface Headphones 2
products.description: Surface Headphones 2 deliver rich premium sound with 13 levels of on-ear dial ANC control. Built-in Cortana and compatibility with Alexa and Google Assistant for hands-free productivity. Up to 20 hours music, 16 hours calling battery life.
features: Works with Cortana, Alexa, Google Assistant

products.title: Audio-Technica ATH-M50xBT2 Wireless
products.description: The ATH-M50xBT2 brings the legendary M50x studio sound to wireless with Bluetooth 5.0. Features Touch controls, 50-hour battery, and multipoint pairing for two devices simultaneously. Collapsible design and included carrying case for portability.

products.title: Keychron Q1 Pro QMK Wireless Keyboard
products.description: The Keychron Q1 Pro is a 75% QMK/VIA-compatible wireless mechanical keyboard with a premium aluminum body. Hot-swappable PCB supports 5-pin switches for easy customization. Gasket-mounted design with double-layer foam for a uniquely smooth and satisfying typing feel.

products.title: Logitech MX Mechanical Mini Wireless
products.description: MX Mechanical Mini combines the precision of mechanical switches with smart features for productivity. Backlit keys with smart illumination that activates when your hands approach and turns off when you step away. Works across 3 devices via Bluetooth or Logi Bolt USB receiver.
features: Multi-device via Bluetooth or Logi Bolt
Tactile Quiet or Linear switch options

products.title: Das Keyboard 4 Professional Cherry MX Blue
products.description: Das Keyboard 4 Professional is built with Cherry MX Blue switches for satisfying tactile and audible feedback. Anodized aluminum top panel provides a premium feel and extra durability. Two USB 3.0 SuperSpeed ports on the back for hub connectivity.

products.title: Corsair K70 RGB MK.2 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: The K70 RGB MK.2 features Cherry MX Speed or Red switches in an aircraft-grade anodized aluminum frame. Per-key dynamic RGB backlighting powered by Corsair iCUE software for stunning lighting effects. Detachable soft-touch wrist rest included for comfortable long-session gaming.

products.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless
products.description: The Apex Pro TKL Wireless features OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable mechanical switches — the world's fastest keyboard. Customize actuation from 0.2mm to 3.8mm per key for unmatched control. Compact TKL form factor with Bluetooth 5.0 and 2.4GHz ultra-low latency wireless.

products.title: HHKB Professional Hybrid Type-S
products.description: The HHKB Professional Hybrid Type-S uses Topre electrostatic capacitive switches for a silky-smooth, silent keystroke. Compact 60% layout beloved by programmers and writers worldwide. Bluetooth multi-device pairing with up to 4 devices simultaneously.

products.title: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro Wireless
products.description: BlackWidow V4 Pro features Razer Yellow linear optical-mechanical switches for the fastest response time. Doubleshot PBT keycaps resist shine and wear for long-lasting key legends. Includes a multi-function roller and 4 dedicated macro keys.

products.title: NuPhy Air75 V2 Wireless Keyboard
products.description: NuPhy Air75 V2 is an ultra-slim 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with low-profile gateron switches. Gasket-mounted structure with a 3-layer sound-absorbing foam for premium typing experience. Supports 3-mode connection: Bluetooth 5.0, 2.4GHz, and wired USB-C.

products.title: Ducky One 3 TKL Hot-Swap RGB
products.description: Ducky One 3 TKL features a hot-swappable PCB supporting both 3-pin and 5-pin switches without soldering. Premium PBT doubleshot keycaps with vibrant dye-sublimated legends that never fade. QUACK mechanics sound dampening system for a quieter, more pleasant typing experience.

products.title: Akko 5075B Plus Wireless Keyboard
products.description: Akko 5075B Plus offers a hot-swappable 75% layout with triple-mode wireless at an accessible price point. Pre-lubed Akko CS switches provide smooth, satisfying keystrokes out of the box. South-facing RGB LEDs with full per-key lighting customization.

products.title: Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40
products.description: The Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 40 delivers a responsive, cushioned ride for everyday training runs. Forefoot Zoom Air unit provides springy, snappy energy return with each stride. Engineered mesh upper with targeted support zones keeps your foot locked in comfortably.
features: Rubber outsole for durability and traction

products.title: Brooks Ghost 15 Running Shoe
products.description: Brooks Ghost 15 is the perfect everyday trainer offering a smooth, balanced ride for neutral runners. DNA LOFT v2 cushioning adapts to your stride for soft, protective landings on any surface. Engineered air mesh upper is breathable and adaptive for a glove-like fit.

products.title: ASICS Gel-Kayano 30 Stability Shoe
products.description: ASICS Gel-Kayano 30 provides maximum support and superior cushioning for overpronators and flat-footed runners. 4D Guidance System adapts to your unique gait for personalized stability. FF BLAST PLUS ECO midsole compound is both lightweight and durable.
features: GEL technology in heel and forefoot

products.title: Hoka Clifton 9 Road Running Shoe
products.description: Hoka Clifton 9 is celebrated for its legendary softness and lightweight feel, updated with a wider toe box for natural splay. Full-length EVA midsole with a low heel-toe drop encourages a smooth heel-to-toe transition. Early-stage Meta-Rocker geometry propels you forward with less effort.
features: Wider toe box for natural foot splay

products.title: New Balance Fresh Foam X 1080v13
products.description: The 1080v13 features Fresh Foam X midsole foam for an ultra-cushioned, luxurious long-run experience. Hypoknit upper wraps your foot in adaptive, strategic support with minimal seam irritation. Ideal for high-mileage training and long-distance race days.

products.title: Saucony Endorphin Speed 3
products.description: Endorphin Speed 3 features PWRRUN PB foam and a nylon speedroll plate for explosive energy return at race pace. The lightweight FORMFIT upper delivers a sock-like feel with minimal distraction. Perfect for tempo runs, long runs, and race day.
features: PWRRUN PB foam + nylon speedroll plate
Versatile for tempo and race day

products.title: On Cloudmonster 2 Running Shoe
products.description: Cloudmonster 2 features extra-large CloudTec Phase cushioning pods for maximum impact absorption on long runs. Helion superfoam midsole stays light and responsive even in cold temperatures. Wide base provides enhanced stability for longer distances.

products.title: Adidas Ultraboost 23 Running Shoe
products.description: Ultraboost 23 features full-length BOOST midsole technology delivering incredible energy return mile after mile. Primeknit+ upper moves with your foot for a sock-like adaptive fit. TORSIONSPRING technology provides stability and support through the midfoot.

products.title: Mizuno Wave Rider 27
products.description: Wave Rider 27 features Mizuno's signature WAVE plate technology for superior cushioning and stability in a lightweight package. ENERZY CORE midsole material delivers 15% more energy return and 15% softer feel vs previous generation. Ideal for neutral runners seeking a smooth, energetic ride.

products.title: Salomon Speedcross 6 Trail Running Shoe
products.description: Speedcross 6 is designed for technical trail running with aggressive chevron lugs that grip mud and soft terrain. SensiFit construction wraps your foot for precise, secure hold on uneven terrain. EnergyCell midsole offers excellent cushioning for long days on the trail.
features: Aggressive chevron lugs for mud and trail

products.title: SkinCeuticals C E Ferulic Vitamin C Serum
products.description: C E Ferulic combines 15% pure vitamin C with 1% vitamin E and 0.5% ferulic acid for advanced environmental protection. This antioxidant combination neutralizes free radicals, reduces fine lines, and improves the appearance of skin tone. Dermatologist tested and clinically proven for all skin types.
features: Combined with vitamin E and ferulic acid

products.title: The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
products.description: This formula combines low, medium and high molecular weight hyaluronic acid with a Hyaluronic Acid Crosspolymer for multi-depth hydration. Vitamin B5 complements surface hydration for a plumper, smoother complexion. Lightweight, oil-free formula suitable for all skin types including sensitive.
features: Fragrance-free and suitable for all skin types

products.title: Paula's Choice 10% Niacinamide Booster
products.description: 10% niacinamide booster visibly improves enlarged pores, uneven skin tone, and dullness with continued use. Can be mixed into your existing moisturizer or used alone as a targeted treatment serum. Fragrance-free and non-irritating, suitable for sensitive and acne-prone skin.
features: Mixable with moisturizer or use alone

products.title: Drunk Elephant B-Hydra Intensive Hydration Serum
products.description: B-Hydra delivers intense, long-lasting hydration using pro-vitamin B5, pineapple ceramide, and sodium hyaluronate. The lightweight gel formula is ideal for oily or combination skin that needs hydration without heaviness. Free from essential oils, silicones, and drying alcohols.
features: Free from essential oils and silicones

products.title: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Serum
products.description: Advanced Night Repair is powered by exclusive ChronoluxCB Technology to synchronize skin's natural nighttime repair. Just 4 weeks of nightly use visibly reduces fine lines, dullness, and uneven skin tone. Hyaluronic acid provides 72-hour hydration for plump, healthy-looking skin.

products.title: Cetaphil Bright Healthy Radiance Serum
products.description: Formulated with niacinamide, vitamin C, and turmeric to brighten and even out skin tone. Lightweight serum absorbs quickly and works synergistically with your existing routine. Dermatologist tested, fragrance-free, and suitable for sensitive skin.

products.title: Neutrogena Rapid Wrinkle Repair Retinol Serum
products.description: Retinol SA, glucose complex, and hyaluronic acid work together to visibly smooth wrinkles in just one week. Accelerated Retinol SA formula renews surface cells continuously throughout the day and night. Lightweight and fast-absorbing, suitable for daily morning and evening use.
features: Fast-absorbing for day and night use

products.title: COSRX Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
products.description: 96% snail secretion filtrate repairs damaged skin and restores moisture for a supple, radiant complexion. Lightweight watery texture absorbs almost instantly without any sticky residue. Clinically tested to improve skin texture, elasticity, and hydration after 4 weeks.

products.title: La Roche-Posay Hyalu B5 Pure Hyaluronic Acid Serum
products.description: Formulated with two types of hyaluronic acid and vitamin B5 to intensely hydrate and plump the skin. Allergy tested and suitable for sensitive, acne-prone, and post-procedure skin. Lightweight, fast-absorbing formula that layers seamlessly under moisturizer and SPF.
features: Suitable for sensitive and post-procedure skin

products.title: Olay Regenerist Micro-Sculpting Serum
products.description: Powered by Olay's amino-peptide complex II with niacinamide and vitamin B3, this serum visibly firms and lifts with continued use. Ultra-lightweight formula penetrates 10 surface layers in just 2 days to hydrate from deep within. Fragrance-free option available for sensitive skin.
features: Visibly firms and lifts in 4 weeks

products.title: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
products.description: Gold Standard 100% Whey is the world's best-selling whey protein powder, delivering 24g of protein and 5.5g of BCAAs per serving. Primarily uses whey protein isolates as the main ingredient for fast digestion and absorption. Available in over 20 flavors with low sugar content.

products.title: Dymatize ISO100 Hydrolyzed Whey Protein Isolate
products.description: ISO100 is made with 100% hydrolyzed whey protein isolate for rapid absorption and maximum muscle recovery. Each serving delivers 25g of protein with less than 1g of sugar and fat. Gluten-free and certified by Informed-Sport for athletes.

products.title: Garden of Life Sport Organic Plant Protein
products.description: NSF Certified for Sport organic plant-based protein with 30g of protein per serving from pea, navy bean, lentil bean, garbanzo bean, and cranberry seed. Includes 2 billion CFU probiotics and certified organic ingredients. No synthetic fillers, artificial flavors, or colors.

products.title: Cellucor C4 Ultimate Shred Pre-Workout
products.description: C4 Ultimate Shred combines 300mg caffeine, L-carnitine, and CLA for a thermogenic pre-workout that supports both performance and fat loss. Arginine Nitrate provides enhanced pumps and blood flow during training. Zero sugar formula in 8 bold flavors.

products.title: Muscle Milk Genuine Protein Powder Chocolate
products.description: Muscle Milk Genuine protein powder delivers 32g of protein per serving with a blend of high-quality proteins including calcium sodium caseinate, milk protein isolate, and whey protein isolate. Contains essential vitamins and minerals, including calcium and vitamins A, C, and D. Great-tasting chocolate flavor with a creamy texture.
features: Vitamins A, C, D and calcium fortified

products.title: Vega Sport Premium Vegan Protein Powder
products.description: Vega Sport Premium delivers 30g of plant-based protein from a blend of pea, pumpkin seed, organic sunflower seed, and alfalfa. NSF Certified for Sport and Non-GMO Project Verified. Contains 6g BCAAs and 5g glutamine for recovery support.

products.title: BSN SYNTHA-6 Ultra-Premium Protein Matrix
products.description: SYNTHA-6 is an ultra-premium sustained release protein powder with 22g protein per serving from a multi-functional protein matrix. Features an extraordinary taste profile that makes hitting daily protein goals enjoyable. Each serving includes 10g of essential amino acids and 5g of fiber.

products.title: Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Isolate
products.description: Made from 100% grass-fed whey protein isolate with 28g protein, 1g carbs, and 0g added sugar per serving. No artificial sweeteners, food dyes, or unnecessary additives — just clean, honest protein. Third-party tested for purity and potency.

products.title: NOW Sports Pea Protein Powder
products.description: NOW Sports Pea Protein is an easy-to-digest plant-based protein powder that provides 24g of protein per serving from non-GMO yellow split peas. Naturally free of most major allergens including dairy, soy, gluten, and eggs. Unflavored version mixes smoothly into shakes or foods.
features: Free from dairy, soy, gluten, egg

products.title: Orgain Organic Protein Plant Based Powder
products.description: Orgain Organic Protein features 21g of USDA certified organic protein from pea, brown rice, and chia seeds in a creamy, delicious formula. Only 150 calories, 4g net carbs, and no added sugar per serving. Gluten-free, soy-free, and made without artificial preservatives or colors.

products.title: Samsonite Classic Business Backpack
products.description: Samsonite Classic Business Backpack fits laptops up to 15.6 inches with dedicated padded compartment. Multiple organization pockets and a trolley strap keep you organized and hands-free. Made with durable polyester and ergonomic padded shoulder straps for all-day comfort.

products.title: Targus 15.6" Drifter Backpack
products.description: Targus Drifter backpack features a dedicated laptop compartment with SafePort Sling protection for your 15.6-inch laptop. Spacious main compartment, multiple accessory pockets, and a front workstation panel keep essentials organized. Padded back panel and shoulder straps for ergonomic support.
features: Padded back panel for ergonomic comfort

products.title: Tumi Alpha Bravo Search Backpack
products.description: Tumi Alpha Bravo Search Backpack is crafted from ballistic nylon with the iconic T-graphic nylon for exceptional durability. Features a dedicated 15-inch laptop pocket, tablet sleeve, and front-zip organizational panel. Add-a-bag sleeve and luggage strap allow it to slide over rolling luggage.

products.title: Peak Design Everyday Backpack 20L
products.description: Peak Design Everyday Backpack 20L features weatherproof 400D recycled nylon canvas with UltraZip magnetic closures for quick access. Flexible divider system (FlexFold) adapts to carry a 16-inch laptop, camera, and everyday gear simultaneously. MagLatch top closure + side access zippers for fast retrieval.

products.title: Knomo Beauchamp 15.6" Laptop Backpack
products.description: Knomo Beauchamp combines smart organization with a professional silhouette using premium leather-effect finish. Tech compartment holds a 15.6-inch laptop and tablet with individual padded sleeves. USB-A charging port and luggage strap for ultimate travel convenience.
features: Individual padded laptop and tablet sleeves

products.title: Amazon Basics 17.3-Inch Laptop Bag
products.description: Amazon Basics laptop bag fits laptops up to 17.3 inches with a fully padded sleeve and scratch-free lining. Lightweight polyester construction with front accessory pocket for cables and chargers. Top and side handles for easy grab-and-go carrying.
features: Multiple exterior handles for easy carry

products.title: Osprey Arcane Large Day Backpack
products.description: Osprey Arcane Large Day is made with 100% recycled materials and bluesign-approved fabrics for eco-conscious travelers. Features a padded laptop sleeve for 15-inch laptops, stretch side water bottle pockets, and a removable hip belt. Lifetime Osprey All Mighty Guarantee included.
features: Removable hip belt for extra support

products.title: Herschel Little America Backpack
products.description: Herschel Little America features a spacious main compartment with fleece-lined 15-inch laptop sleeve and signature striped fabric lining. Woven fabric construction with pin buckle closure gives it its iconic heritage look. External side pockets and organizer panel for everyday carry essentials.
features: Iconic woven fabric with pin buckle

products.title: Briggs & Riley @Work Medium Backpack
products.description: Briggs & Riley @Work Medium Backpack is built with durable, water-resistant 1680D ballistic weave for professionals. Dedicated padded laptop compartment holds up to 15.6-inch laptops with a separate tablet/e-reader pocket. Comes with a lifetime guarantee including damage from airline handling.

products.title: SwissGear 3760 ScanSmart Laptop Backpack
products.description: SwissGear 3760 features ScanSmart technology — lay it flat to go through airport security without removing your laptop. Fits laptops up to 17.3 inches with airflow back padding for ventilated comfort. Multiple organization pockets and a front tech pocket for accessories.

products.title: Apple Watch Series 9 GPS 45mm
products.description: Apple Watch Series 9 features the new S9 SiP chip with a double tap gesture for hands-free control. On-device Siri with health data access, brighter Always-On Retina display, and new Precision Finding for iPhone. Carbon neutral with 100% recycled aluminum case and fluoroelastomer band.
features: New S9 chip with double tap gesture

products.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch6 Classic 47mm
products.description: Galaxy Watch6 Classic revives the beloved rotating bezel for intuitive, glance-free navigation. Advanced Health features include body composition analysis, sleep coaching, and irregular heart rhythm detection. Wear OS 4 powered by Exynos W930 delivers smooth performance.

products.title: Garmin Fenix 7 Solar Multisport GPS Watch
products.description: Garmin Fenix 7 Solar features solar charging lens to extend battery life up to 37 days in smartwatch mode. Preloaded maps, ski maps, and TopoActive maps for route planning anywhere in the world. Multi-GNSS support with multi-band technology for pinpoint accuracy even in challenging environments.

products.title: Fitbit Sense 2 Advanced Health Smartwatch
products.description: Fitbit Sense 2 includes a built-in cEDA sensor to detect body response to stress and help manage it with mindfulness sessions. Daily Readiness Score guides your workout intensity based on activity, sleep, and heart rate variability. 6+ day battery life with 40+ exercise modes.

products.title: Withings ScanWatch 2 Hybrid Smartwatch
products.description: ScanWatch 2 combines a classic analog watch design with medical-grade ECG, SpO2, and temperature sensors. 30-day battery life in a hybrid case that looks like a traditional watch but works like a medical device. FDA-cleared ECG app for atrial fibrillation detection.

products.title: Amazfit GTR 4 Smart Watch
products.description: Amazfit GTR 4 delivers a premium AMOLED display, dual-band GPS, and Bluetooth phone calls in a stylish aluminum case. Up to 14-day battery life with 150+ built-in sports modes. Zepp OS with Alexa built-in for smart assistant access on your wrist.

products.title: Google Pixel Watch 2
products.description: Google Pixel Watch 2 is powered by the Snapdragon W5 chip for faster performance and longer battery. Fitbit's most advanced health tools including continuous electrodermal activity tracking for stress management. Wear OS 4 with deep Google integration for Maps, Wallet, and Assistant.
features: Continuous EDA stress tracking via Fitbit
Deep Google integration with Wear OS 4

products.title: Polar Vantage V3 Multisport GPS Watch
products.description: Polar Vantage V3 integrates optical ECG, SpO2, blood glucose trend, and skin temperature in an ultra-premium multisport watch. AMOLED touchscreen with sapphire glass display for ultimate durability. Polar's most comprehensive training load and recovery analytics.
features: Optical ECG + SpO2 + blood glucose trend

products.title: Coros Pace 3 Sport GPS Watch
products.description: Coros Pace 3 is one of the lightest sport GPS watches at just 30g, with up to 38-day battery in daily use. Dual-frequency GPS provides highly accurate positioning for track and trail running. EvoLab training analysis gives personalized fitness insights and recovery recommendations.

products.title: Suunto Race S Titanium Sport Watch
products.description: Suunto Race S Titanium features a stunning AMOLED display in a lightweight titanium case designed for endurance athletes. Offline maps and slope-specific navigation for trails and ski resorts. Heart rate, SpO2, and sleep tracking with up to 7-day battery in smartwatch mode.

products.title: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat 6mm
products.description: Manduka PRO is the gold standard in yoga mats, built to last a lifetime with a lifetime guarantee. Closed-cell surface prevents moisture and bacteria from penetrating for a hygienic, non-slip practice. 6mm thick PVC cushioning provides joint support for any style of yoga.

products.title: Liforme Original Yoga Mat
products.description: Liforme Original features the patented AlignForMe system — alignment markers printed directly on the mat to guide hand, foot, and body positioning. Natural rubber base for incredible grip in the sweatiest conditions. 4.2mm thick eco-polyurethane top layer for cushion and traction.
features: Natural rubber base with eco-PU top

products.title: Gaiam Premium Printed Yoga Mat 5mm
products.description: Gaiam Premium Printed mat offers a sticky non-slip surface with beautiful printed designs to inspire your practice. 5mm PVC construction provides firm yet comfortable cushioning for all yoga styles. Lightweight and includes a free yoga strap for easy rolling and carrying.

products.title: Jade Harmony Professional Yoga Mat
products.description: Jade Harmony is made from natural rubber tapped from rubber trees — no PVC, EVA, or synthetic rubber. Provides excellent cushioning and grip especially for hot yoga with natural, moisture-responsive traction. For every mat sold, Jade plants a tree through their Trees for the Earth program.
features: 100% natural rubber — no PVC or synthetics
Plants one tree per mat sold

products.title: Lululemon The Reversible Mat 5mm
products.description: Lululemon's Reversible Mat features two different textures — smooth top for dynamic practice and textured bottom for maximum grip. Made with natural rubber for responsiveness and cushioning without bulk. Free from harmful chemicals: PVC-free, latex-free, and top 6 chemical free.
features: Two textures — smooth and grippy sides

products.title: Retrospec Solana Yoga Mat 1-inch Thick
products.description: Retrospec Solana is a thick 1-inch (25mm) yoga mat for extra joint and back support — ideal for restorative yoga, meditation, and pilates. NBR foam construction is dense, resilient, and easy to clean with a damp cloth. Includes a carrying strap with ring closure for portability.
features: Ideal for restorative yoga and meditation
Easy to clean, includes carrying strap

products.title: Cork Yoga Mat by Yoloha
products.description: Yoloha Cork Yoga Mat has a natural cork top surface that becomes grippier as it gets wetter — perfect for hot yoga. Cork is naturally antimicrobial, so the mat stays odor-free and hygienic with minimal cleaning. Backed by natural rubber for cushion and to prevent slipping.
features: Cork surface gets grippier when wet

products.title: B Yoga B MAT Strong 6mm
products.description: B MAT Strong is made with 100% rubber for outstanding grip that doesn't require a yoga towel even in hot classes. Dense 6mm construction protects joints without compressing under weight — stays flat on the floor without curling. Lifetime guarantee with a repurposing program for end-of-life mats.

products.title: Amazon Basics TPE Yoga Mat 6mm
products.description: Amazon Basics TPE yoga mat offers lightweight, eco-friendly cushioning made from thermoplastic elastomer — free from PVC, latex, and harmful chemicals. Dual-sided non-slip texture prevents shifting during practice. 6mm thickness provides comfortable cushioning for most yoga styles.

products.title: Hugger Mugger Para Rubber Yoga Mat
products.description: Hugger Mugger Para Rubber mat uses pure Amazonian para rubber for exceptional, durable grip across all yoga styles. The rough textured surface provides naturally tacky grip that improves with practice. 4.8mm thickness balances cushioning and floor connection for standing and balance poses.

products.title: Breville Barista Express Espresso Machine
products.description: Breville Barista Express is an all-in-one espresso machine with integrated conical burr grinder for freshly ground coffee in every shot. Digital temperature control (PID) delivers precise espresso extraction at optimal temperature. Includes steam wand for microfoam milk for lattes and cappuccinos.

products.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGT Coffee Maker
products.description: Technivorm Moccamaster brews directly into a thermal carafe to keep coffee hot for hours without a heating plate. Certified by the Specialty Coffee Association for brewing at the optimal 196-205°F water temperature. Handmade in the Netherlands with a 5-year warranty.
features: Thermal carafe — no hot plate needed

products.title: Keurig K-Supreme Plus SMART Coffee Maker
products.description: K-Supreme Plus SMART allows custom brew profiles to be saved and recalled for every K-Cup pod with BrewID technology. MultiStream technology saturates coffee grounds more evenly for better flavor extraction. Compatible with Amazon Alexa for voice-activated brewing.
features: BrewID custom brew profiles per pod

products.title: Cuisinart DCC-3200P1 PerfecTemp 14-Cup Coffee Maker
products.description: Cuisinart PerfecTemp maintains brewing temperature at the optimal 200°F for the best flavor extraction into a 14-cup glass carafe. Brew Strength selector with Regular and Bold settings lets you customize intensity. Fully automatic with a 24-hour programmable clock and auto shut-off.
features: Regular and Bold brew strength settings

products.title: OXO Brew 9-Cup Coffee Maker
products.description: OXO Brew 9-Cup features a rainmaker showerhead that distributes water evenly across the entire grounds bed for optimal extraction. SCA-certified to brew at the precise temperature range for specialty coffee. Stainless steel thermal carafe keeps coffee hot for hours without bitterness.
features: Thermal carafe for hours of heat retention

products.title: Ninja CE251 Programmable Coffee Maker
products.description: Ninja CE251 brews a rich, full-flavored 12-cup carafe with a mid-brew pause-and-pour feature for immediate coffee access. Programmable 24-hour delay brew lets you wake up to a fresh pot. Adjustable keep-warm plate maintains temperature without overcooking your coffee.

products.title: De'Longhi Magnifica Evo Automatic Espresso
products.description: De'Longhi Magnifica Evo is a fully automatic bean-to-cup machine with a built-in grinder and advanced latte system. My Latte Art function creates professional-quality lattes and cappuccinos at the touch of a button. Silent operation and one-touch cleaning make daily use effortless.

products.title: Fellow Stagg EKG Electric Kettle
products.description: Fellow Stagg EKG is a precision pour-over kettle with a variable temperature range of 135-212°F and a hold mode to maintain temperature for up to 60 minutes. The gooseneck spout gives precision control over pour rate and direction for specialty coffee brewing. Stopwatch mode on the LCD screen tracks brew time.
features: Gooseneck spout for precision pour control

products.title: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee and Espresso Machine
products.description: Nespresso Vertuo Next uses Centrifusion technology to brew five different cup sizes from espresso to alto with a simple pod swap. Connected via Bluetooth and Wi-Fi for automatic machine updates and ordering reminders. Compact design with a motorized, auto-opening head.
features: Centrifusion for 5 cup sizes from one machine

products.title: Bonavita 8-Cup One-Touch Coffee Maker
products.description: Bonavita 8-Cup features a 1500-watt heater that brews a full carafe in just 6 minutes at the ideal 198-205°F temperature. SCA-certified with a wide-hole flat-bottomed showerhead for even saturation of coffee grounds. One-touch simplicity with an optional pre-infusion mode for bloom brewing.

products.title: BenQ ScreenBar Halo Monitor Light
products.description: BenQ ScreenBar Halo sits on top of your monitor with asymmetric optical design that lights your desk without screen glare. Backlight glow behind the screen reduces eye fatigue during long work sessions. Wireless rotary controller for stepless dimming and color temperature adjustment.

products.title: Elgato Key Light Air Professional LED Panel
products.description: Elgato Key Light Air is a professional LED desk and video lighting panel with 1400 lumens and adjustable color temperature from 2900K-7000K. Controlled via Wi-Fi through the Elgato Control Center app or compatible Stream Deck. Slim, lightweight design with a flexible desk clamp included.
features: Wi-Fi control via app or Stream Deck

products.title: TaoTronics LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
products.description: TaoTronics LED desk lamp features 5 color modes and 7 brightness levels for the perfect ambient setting for any task. Built-in USB-A charging port keeps your devices powered without occupying an outlet. Memory function remembers your last-used settings for instant recall.
features: Memory function for instant settings recall

products.title: Dyson Lightcycle Morph Task Light
products.description: Dyson Lightcycle Morph tracks local daylight using your time and GPS location to automatically adjust brightness and color temperature throughout the day. 60-year LED lifetime with heat pipe technology to keep LEDs cool and maintain consistent light output. Morphs between four modes: task, indirect, feature, and ambient.
features: 60-year LED lifetime with heat pipe cooling

products.title: Govee RGBIC LED Desk Lamp
products.description: Govee RGBIC desk lamp offers 16 million colors with segment control via the Govee Home app, making it perfect for gaming setups and content creators. Music sync mode pulses lighting to beats for immersive entertainment. Touch controls and voice command compatibility with Alexa and Google Assistant.

products.title: Humanscale Nova Task Lamp
products.description: Humanscale Nova uses LEED-qualifying LED technology with energy efficiency 80% better than incandescent lamps. Infinite glare-free positioning with a sleek, tool-free adjustable arm and head. BIFMA-compliant and designed to reduce eye strain during extended computer work.

products.title: Philips Hue White and Color Ambiance Go
products.description: Philips Hue Go is a portable desk light that works wirelessly up to 3 hours on its built-in battery. 16 million colors and whites integrate into your Hue smart home ecosystem for app-controlled scenes and routines. Works with Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, and Matter.
features: Works with Alexa, Google, HomeKit, Matter

products.title: VIVO LED Desk Lamp with Clamp
products.description: VIVO clamp-on desk lamp attaches to surfaces up to 2.5 inches thick, freeing up desk space. Flexible gooseneck allows 360-degree positioning to aim light precisely where needed. 3 color modes and 10 brightness levels with a convenient touch control panel.
features: Clamp mount frees desk surface space

products.title: Lumiy Lightblade 1500S LED Desk Lamp
products.description: Lumiy Lightblade 1500S is one of the brightest desk lamps available at 1500 lux at 18 inches — over 2x brighter than most competitors. Stepless touch dimmer and color temperature control from warm 2700K to daylight 6500K. Wide 90cm light blade eliminates shadows across your entire workspace.

products.title: Anker Eufy Lumos Smart Bulb White
products.description: Anker Eufy Lumos Smart Bulb offers tunable white light from warm 2700K to cool 6500K, dimmable from 1-100% via the EufyHome app. No hub required — connects directly to 2.4GHz Wi-Fi for instant app and voice control. Compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant for seamless smart home integration.
